title: Business Case & Opportunity Sizing
shortDescription: Build a data-driven business case with opportunity sizing, cost-benefit analysis, and investment recommendation.
jobsToBeDone: Justify a product investment to leadership with data
Size the revenue or impact opportunity realistically
Compare build vs. buy vs. partner options
Quantify risks and model different scenarios

inputs.label: Opportunity Description
inputs.example: Add a native analytics dashboard to our project management tool so users can visualize project health, team velocity, and resource allocation without exporting to spreadsheets

inputs.label: Target Segment & Size
inputs.example: Our existing 3,200 paying teams on Pro/Business plans. 68% have requested reporting features in the last 12 months. Average contract value $840/year

inputs.label: Strategic Context
inputs.example: Top competitor launched analytics 6 months ago and is winning deals we used to close. Analytics is the #1 requested feature in our feedback board (420 votes). Current workaround: users export CSV to Google Sheets

inputs.label: Cost & Resource Assumptions
inputs.example: Estimated 2 engineers + 1 designer for 4 months. Would need a data pipeline (considering Clickhouse). Could charge $10/seat/month as an add-on or include in Business plan to drive upgrades

inputs.label: Target Success Metrics
inputs.example: Reduce churn in Pro tier by 15%, increase Pro→Business upgrade rate by 10%, generate $200K ARR from analytics add-on in year 1

inputs.label: Known Risks & Concerns
inputs.example: Engineering team is already stretched on core platform reliability. Data infrastructure is immature. Competitor has 6-month head start. Privacy considerations for aggregated team data
